title: JEP EU Compliance — Recruitment & HR Extension
description: JSON Schema for JEP events in recruitment and HR under EU AI Act Annex III (4)(a).

job_id_hash.description: Hash of job description or requisition

candidate_anon_id.description: Salted hash — must not contain plaintext PII

bias_audit_flag.description: True if bias detected in audit

diversity_metric_hash.description: Hash of diversity and equity report

human_final_decision.description: Must be true for Annex III compliance

candidate_notification_hash.description: Hash of notification sent to candidate
